title: Question: How to use connect for concatenation?
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

```
add -input in_foo 2
add -wire w_foo 2
connect -set in_foo w_foo
```
Above works fine but how to connect single wires in design to wire w_foo?

`connect -set w_foo {\_20_, \_21_}
`
## Expected behavior
Works
## Actual behavior
```
ERROR: Failed to parse set rhs expression `{\_20_,'.
```
code_blocks:
add -input in_foo 2
add -wire w_foo 2
connect -set in_foo w_foo
